zh.lifeSummary: 當Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity於大約1090年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根可迪時，她的父親Morgan ap Meurig of Coity46歲，母親Gwenwyn verch Cyfan of Glamorgan36歲。她與Payne de Turberville I結婚。他們至少是10個兒子的父母。她去世於1172年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根可迪享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity于大约1090年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根可迪时，她的父亲Morgan ap Meurig of Coity46岁，母亲Gwenwyn verch Cyfan of Glamorgan36岁。她与Payne de Turberville I结婚。他们至少是10个儿子的父母。她去世于1172年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根可迪享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

variants.name: Sarah
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibella
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Coity
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, which is rare, apparently in origin a local name from a diminutive form of French côte ‘riverbank’. Use as a given name has probably been influenced by its resemblance to Cody .

en.lifeSummary: When Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity was born about 1090, in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Morgan ap Meurig of Coity, was 46 and her mother, Gwenwyn verch Cyfan of Glamorgan, was 36. She married Payne de Turberville I. They were the parents of at least 10 sons. She died in 1172, in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

Elle a épousé Payne de Turberville I. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils. Elle est décédée en 1172, à Coity, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity um 1090 in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Morgan ap Meurig of Coity 46 und ihre Mutter Gwenwyn verch Cyfan of Glamorgan 36. Sie hat Payne de Turberville I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne. Sie starb 1172 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity(이)가 대략 1090년 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Morgan ap Meurig of Coity(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenwyn verch Cyfan of Glamorgan(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Payne de Turberville I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1172년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity родилась около 1090 г. в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Morgan ap Meurig of Coity было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenwyn verch Cyfan of Glamorgan, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Payne de Turberville I. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей. Она умерла в 1172 г. в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity nació aproximadamente 1090, en Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Morgan ap Meurig of Coity, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Gwenwyn verch Cyfan of Glamorgan, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Payne de Turberville I. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos. Murió en 1172, en Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años.
